dateRange.description: Window to bucket. Defaults to last hour. Use a bucket's date_from/date_to from a prior response to recursively narrow into a sub-range.

date_from.description: Start of the date range. Accepts ISO 8601 timestamps or relative formats: -7d, -1h, -1mStart, etc.

date_to.description: End of the date range. Same format as date_from. Omit or null for "now".

filterGroup.description: Property filters applied before bucketing. Same shape as `query-logs`.

key.description: Attribute key. For type "log", use "message". For "log_attribute"/"log_resource_attribute", use the attribute key (e.g. "k8s.container.name").

operator.description:
Comparison operator.

* `exact` - exact
* `is_not` - is_not
* `icontains` - icontains
* `not_icontains` - not_icontains
* `regex` - regex
* `not_regex` - not_regex
* `gt` - gt
* `lt` - lt
* `is_date_exact` - is_date_exact
* `is_date_before` - is_date_before
* `is_date_after` - is_date_after
* `is_set` - is_set
* `is_not_set` - is_not_set

type.description:
"log" filters the log body/message. "log_attribute" filters log-level attributes. "log_resource_attribute" filters resource-level attributes.

* `log` - log
* `log_attribute` - log_attribute
* `log_resource_attribute` - log_resource_attribute

value.description: Value to compare against. String, number, or array of strings. Omit for is_set/is_not_set operators.

searchTerm.description: Full-text search across log bodies. Applied before bucketing.

serviceNames.description: Filter by service names. Applied before bucketing.

severityLevels.description: Filter by log severity levels. Applied before bucketing.

items.description:
* `trace` - trace
* `debug` - debug
* `info` - info
* `warn` - warn
* `error` - error
* `fatal` - fatal

targetBuckets.description: Approximate number of buckets to return. The bucket interval is picked adaptively from a fixed list (1/5/10s, 1/2/5/10/15/30/60/120/240/360/720/1440m) to land near this target. Defaults to 10, capped at 100.
